title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
